hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.yaml|*.yml) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; d="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; cd "$d" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; [ -f aurora-projector.yaml ] || exit 0; out=$(esphome config aurora-projector.yaml 2>&1) && out=$(esphome config aurora-projector-ha.yaml 2>&1) || { printf '%s\n' "$out" | tail -20; echo 'esphome config validation FAILED'; exit 2; }
